card_name_verified: World of Hyatt Credit Card (Chase, $95 AF)
_review_reason: Card's primary recurring benefit is 1 Free Night Award at Category 4 or lower property each anniversary (no published USD value — Hyatt does not assign dollar amount). Per OpenCard convention requiring USD dollar amounts, Free Night Award cannot be quantified and is excluded. Other benefits: 5 elite night credits/year (qualitative), conditional 2nd free night after $15k spend (conditional, excluded), 1-yr DashPass promotional (excluded). Recommend either (a) accept Free Night with operator-set fair-value amount (~$200-300), OR (b) leave empty and document qualitative benefits in card description elsewhere.
_excluded: Free Night Award Cat 4 or lower (no published USD; convention says exclude)
